title: Spectral Photogrammetry Protocol
author: Aurore Mathys
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zzgf73w
materials: Separate the wavelengths in different folders.

steps.title: Place de specimen at the center...
steps.instruction: Place de specimen at the center of the turntable with scales, photogrammetry marker and MSI calibration card (CHSOS).

steps.title: Setup the correct exposure for each...
steps.instruction: Setup the correct exposure for each wavelenght and verify that the exposure is correct in spectrashoot using the MSI calibration card. Adjust exposure until the specimen is correctly lit.

steps.title: Setup lamp and camera distance
steps.instruction: Setup lamp and camera distance. Place the camera at approximately 30°.

steps.title: Start capturing
steps.instruction: Start capturing: for one specimen position capture at all the 15 wavelengths + white light. Then add the UV-pass filter and capture pictures in the UV wavelengths (UVR). Next place the UV-cut off filter and capture picture for each UV wavelengths (UVF). Pictures should be capturated in raw format.

steps.title: Rotate the turntable of 10° and repeat step 4
steps.instruction: Rotate the turntable of 10° and repeat step 4. Do this for the complete rotation.

steps.title: Move the camera at an angle...
steps.instruction: Move the camera at an angle of 60° at the approximately the same distance than previously and repeat the operation for the complete rotation.

steps.title: If necessary turn the specimen and...
steps.instruction: If necessary turn the specimen and repeat the process for as many rotation/views as necessary.

steps.title: Open Agisoft Photoscan and create a...
steps.instruction: Open Agisoft Photoscan and create a chunk for each wavelengths (rename the chunks accordingly). Import the pictures.

steps.title: Go to workflow > batch process...
steps.instruction: Go to workflow > batch process and add the following step: align pictures (highest), build dense cloud (high), build mesh (high).

steps.title: Repeat the processing 3 times to...
steps.instruction: Repeat the processing 3 times to make sure the results are reliable.

steps.title: If the results are reliable, export the models as
steps.instruction: If the results are reliable, export the models as .stl for surface analysis.
